intro: Aloe vera gel is a natural and soothing substance extracted from the leaves of the aloe vera plant, known for its numerous health and beauty benefits. It has anti-inflammatory properties that can help to calm and heal skin irritations, burns, and minor cuts, making it a popular ingredient in skincare products. Additionally, aloe vera gel is often used to promote hydration and improve the overall texture and appearance of the skin, leaving it feeling soft and refreshed.
